regexCodeList.string: ^Global Quest: See 'Help Global Quests', or, type 'Gquest Join \d+' to take part\.?\s*$

Script.name: GQWarn_Script
Script.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- GQuest_Warning v2.1 - Mudlet Port (initial) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
GQWarn = GQWarn or {}
local SOUND_FILE = "GQ about to start.wav" local DEFAULT_CHANNEL = "note"
local function trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")) end
local function note(msg) cecho("<gold>[GQWarn] <white>" .. msg .. "\n") end
local function dbg(msg) if GQWarn.debug_on then cecho("<dodger_blue>[GQDebug] <white>" .. msg .. "\n") end end
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/gqwarn_state.lua"
local function load_state() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local loaded = nil local ok, data = pcall(dofile, STATE_FILE) if ok and type(data) == "table" then loaded = data if type(loaded[1]) == "table" and type(loaded.channel) ~= "string" and type(loaded.debug_on) ~= "boolean" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end end if not loaded and type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, data2 = pcall(table.load, STATE_FILE) if ok2 and type(data2) == "table" then loaded = data2 end end end loaded = loaded or {}
GQWarn.channel = trim(loaded.channel) if GQWarn.channel == "" then GQWarn.channel = DEFAULT_CHANNEL end GQWarn.debug_on = (loaded.debug_on == true) end
local function save_state() local payload = { channel = GQWarn.channel, debug_on = (GQWarn.debug_on == true), }
local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. string.format("{ channel = %q, debug_on = %s }", payload.channel or "", tostring(payload.debug_on))) f:close() end end
local function get_channel() local ch = trim(GQWarn.channel) if ch == "" then return DEFAULT_CHANNEL end return ch end
local function file_exists(path) local f = io.open(path, "rb") if f then f:close() return true end return false end
local function try_play_sound() local home = "" if type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" then home = trim(getMudletHomeDir()) end
local candidates = { SOUND_FILE, "Sounds/" .. SOUND_FILE, "sounds/" .. SOUND_FILE, }
if home ~= "" then table.insert(candidates, home .. "/" .. SOUND_FILE) table.insert(candidates, home .. "/Sounds/" .. SOUND_FILE) table.insert(candidates, home .. "/sounds/" .. SOUND_FILE) end
for _, path in ipairs(candidates) do if file_exists(path) then dbg("Playing sound: " .. path) if type(playSoundFile) == "function" then playSoundFile(path) elseif type(playSound) == "function" then playSound(path) else note("Sound API unavailable in this Mudlet build.") end return end end
note("Sound file '" .. SOUND_FILE .. "' not found in expected locations.") dbg("Searched: " .. table.concat(candidates, ", ")) end
local function send_channel_message(message, is_test) local channel = get_channel() local prefix = is_test and "[Test] " or ""
if channel == "note" then cecho("\n<cyan>" .. prefix .. message .. "\n") return end
local cmd = channel .. " " .. message if is_test then cmd = channel .. " " .. prefix .. message end
if type(send) == "function" then send(cmd, false) end end
function GQWarn_OnTrigger(_) dbg("Joinable global quest trigger fired.") try_play_sound()
local msg = "You can join a global quest." send_channel_message(msg, false) dbg("Notification sent to channel '" .. get_channel() .. "'.") end
function GQWarn_Cmd_Help() note("--- Global Quest Warning Help ---") note("gqwarn help : Shows this help.") note("gqwarn channel [name] : Sets the warning channel (e.g., ct).") note(" Use 'note' to print locally.") note("gqwarn text <message> : Sends a test message to current channel.") note("gqwarn debug [on|off] : Toggles debug messages.") note("---------------------------------") note("Current Channel: " .. get_channel()) note("Current Debug: " .. (GQWarn.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF")) end
function GQWarn_Cmd_Debug(matches) local status = trim(matches[2]):lower() GQWarn.debug_on = (status == "on") save_state() note("Debug mode is now " .. (GQWarn.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") end
function GQWarn_Cmd_Channel(matches) local channel = trim(matches[2]) if channel == "" then note("Current warning channel: " .. get_channel()) return end
GQWarn.channel = channel:lower() save_state() note("Warning channel set to: " .. GQWarn.channel) end
function GQWarn_Cmd_Text(matches) local message = trim(matches[2]) if message == "" then note("You must provide a message. Example: gqwarn text hello") return end
send_channel_message(message, true) note("Test message sent to channel '" .. get_channel() .. "'.") end
local function init() load_state() dbg("Initialized with channel='" .. get_channel() .. "'.") end
init()
